channel.title: Confidential Containers pattern on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Confidential Containers pattern on Validated Patterns

item.title: Azure requirements
item.description: Azure requirements This pattern has been tested on Microsoft Azure using self-managed OpenShift 4.19.28+ clusters provisioned with openshift-install. OpenShift documentation contains details on how to install a cluster on Azure.

item.title: CoCo pattern tested environments
item.description: Tested environments Current version (5.*) Version 5 introduces Kyverno-based cc_init_data injection, bare metal support (Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP), and Technology Preview NVIDIA confidential GPU support (H100, H200, B100, B200).

item.title: Getting started
item.description: Deploying Prerequisites Azure deployments Install an OpenShift 4.19.28+ Cluster on Azure Update the required Azure configuration and secrets in values-global.

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.description: Troubleshooting confidential containers deployments This page provides solutions to common issues encountered when deploying and operating the Confidential Containers pattern.
